description_long: This chair features a striking, modern design with a sculpted wooden frame that forms sweeping, angular lines. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a deep blue fabric, providing a comfortable and visually appealing contrast to the warm wood tones. The armrests are integrated into the frame, curving smoothly from the backrest to the front legs, creating a continuous, flowing silhouette. The legs are splayed and sharply angled, giving the chair a dynamic, almost futuristic stance. The backrest is triangular and tapers toward the seat, offering ergonomic support. This chair would be a stylish addition to urban environments such as lobbies, cafes, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with a sculpted wooden frame and deep blue upholstered seat and backrest, featuring integrated armrests and sharply angled legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sweeping wooden frame, integrated armrest, and the angled legs supporting the blue upholstered seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, triangular backrest, and the symmetry of the wooden frame and armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the angular frame and armrest, with the blue upholstery and splayed legs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the curved backrest and the way the wooden frame wraps around the back of the chair.
